description:
Clearly you have no idea what’s coming for you… 😈😘

UQ… you thought Mondays were just another day?
Nah. We’re about to turn them into a whole Bollywood EXPERIENCE 💃🏽🕺🏽

This isn’t just dance classes.
This is TS bringing the ENERGY, the VIBE and the CULTURE straight to you.

In collaboration with The Best
UQISC × UQ Naatak 🤝✨

📍 Starting Soon! 13th April
📅 Every Monday
⏰ 4–6PM
💸 $8.50 Members (UQISC/UQ Naatak)
💸 $10 Non-Members
🚶 Walk in & pay
🕺 Absolute beginners to experienced dancers
🔥 Zero judgement

Trust us… this is about to be the best part of your week 😮‍🔥

Get a ticket at our link in bio! We are endorsing this fundraiser on May 1st. After 20+ activists have been arrested under Crisafulli’s Orwellian laws, those activists need help to pay for expensive legal costs. Free speech - free Palestine!

VENUE UPDATE 🎉 Kick off this year with the ultimate first-year mixer ✨

Where good vibes, new faces, and great music come together 🎶🔥

Sign up through our link in bio! 

📅 6th May
📍 St Lucys Cafe, UQ
⏰ 6PM – 8PM

🍽️ Free finger food
🍹 Drinks available - alcoholic & non-alcoholic

🎓 Made for first years, by first years

🎟️ The first drink is free — discounted tickets after

[AHEAD AT ASHURST PRE-PENULTIMATE PROGRAM]

Are you looking to gain an insight into commercial law at a top tier global law firm? 

Ahead at Ashurst is an information evening that provides you the opportunity to explore a career in commercial law with a leading firm. 

Uncover the intricacies of the work, delve into our business operations and practice areas, and receive practical advice to kick start your career with confidence.

Ahead at Ashurst is open to all second and third year undergraduate law students or first year Juris Doctor students. Please complete the registration form below to indicate your interest. 

Key Dates
    •    We will be accepting registrations until 11:59pm on Sunday 10 May 2026.
    •    We will notify students of the outcome of their registration before Thursday 21 May 2026.
    •    The program will be held on Tuesday 2 June 2026, from 5.00pm in our Brisbane office.

Apply here: https://forms.office.com/e/8L3udYRVNz

Learn to make takoyaki 🍡👀

Join our Takoyaki Cooking Class and enjoy a fun, interactive experience celebrating food, culture and community ✨

🗓️ Thu 14 May
📍 Main Course Dining Hall

Choose your session:
2pm – 3:30pm
4pm – 5:30pm

Register via the link in bio

Set sail for the ultimate end-of-semester celebration with UQISC × UQSLA 🚢✨

STARS & SAILS — where movie stars, pop stars, and sports icons take over the river 🌟

📅 21st June
📍 City Botanic Gardens River Hub
⏰ Strict boarding at 5:30PM (boat departs at 6PM sharp)
🕘 Returns at 9PM

🎭 Theme: Cultural Icons
Dress as your favourite movie star, pop star, or sports star from India or Sri Lanka

⚠️ 18+ event
🎟️ Limited tickets — Round 1 dropping soon, stay tuned 

#uqisc #uqsla #baddies #endofsemesterparty #eyekons
